pages.text: 今天晚上，Sam爸爸和Tina妈妈带咘咘来到了一个很特别的商场！商场中间有一个浅浅的小水池，水池里有好多喷泉！
pages.text_en: Tonight, Sam Daddy and Tina Mommy take Bubu to a very special mall! In the middle there's a shallow pool with lots of fountains!

pages.text: 水池周围有好多鹅卵石，像一个个小岛。在水池的正中央，有一颗巨大的苹果——那竟然是一家苹果商店！
pages.text_en: Around the pool are pebble stepping stones like little islands. And right in the center — a giant apple! It's actually an Apple Store!

pages.text: 咘咘睁大了好奇的眼睛：「爸爸，我想去那个苹果商店！」
pages.text_en: Bubu's eyes grow wide with curiosity: "Daddy, I want to go to that Apple Store!"

pages.text: 「那咘咘就像小探险家一样，踩着鹅卵石走过去，好不好？」Sam爸爸笑着说。
pages.text_en: "Then be a little explorer and hop across the stepping stones, okay?" Sam Daddy says with a smile.

pages.text: 咘咘开心地点点头！一步、两步，咘咘在鹅卵石上跳来跳去，好开心呀～NOMI在旁边拍手加油！
pages.text_en: Bubu nods happily! One step, two steps — she hops from stone to stone, so joyful! NOMI cheers her on from the side!

pages.text: 可是突然——噗嗤！咘咘的小脚滑了一下，踩进了冰凉的水里！鞋子湿了……
pages.text_en: But suddenly — splash! Bubu's little foot slips and dips right into the cold water! Her shoe is all wet…

pages.text: 咘咘愣住了。她低头看看湿湿的鞋子，小嘴巴嘟起来，眼泪差点掉下来……好沮丧呀。
pages.text_en: Bubu freezes. She looks down at her wet shoe, her lips start to pout, and tears almost fall… She feels so frustrated.

pages.text: Tina妈妈马上蹲下来，给咘咘一个大大的抱抱：「没关系的！小脚湿了可以擦干，爸爸妈妈在这里陪你呢。」
pages.text_en: Tina Mommy kneels right down and gives Bubu a big warm hug: "It's okay! We can dry your little foot. Daddy and Mommy are right here with you."

pages.text: Sam爸爸轻轻拍拍咘咘的肩膀：「以后碰到什么事情，都可以告诉爸爸妈妈哦。不要自己不开心，我们一起面对，一切都会好起来的！」
pages.text_en: Sam Daddy gently pats Bubu's shoulder: "Whenever something happens, you can always tell Daddy and Mommy. Don't be upset alone — we'll face it together, and everything will be just fine!"

pages.text: 咘咘慢慢不那么难过了，嘴角扬起笑容：「那我们还可以去苹果商店吗？」「当然可以！」
pages.text_en: Bubu slowly feels better, a smile returning to her face: "Can we still go to the Apple Store?" "Of course we can!"

pages.text: 咘咘牵着爸爸妈妈的手，重新踏上鹅卵石，一步一步走进了苹果商店！🌟 碰到小困难不要怕，告诉爸爸妈妈，一切都会好的！
pages.text_en: Bubu holds Daddy and Mommy's hands and steps back onto the stones, walking all the way into the Apple Store! 🌟 When little troubles come, don't be afraid — tell Daddy and Mommy, and everything will be okay!
